creator: dvwerks@gmail.com
text:
Hello, I would like to report back on this.

I am still using the above attacment with good results.

It bombs on Rock3A but the patch allows me to boot on NVMe on the Rock3C and Odroid-M1.

Neither of these boards work with -CURRENT and NVMe without the patch from Peter Jeremy and everyone involved.

Thank You.

Can we get this into 15-CURRENT? It makes many boards with single PCIe slot work.

I have not tested with RK3399 but have it planned and will report back.
